Package Finder

What Package is Right For You?

Answer three questions and the goblin will tell you exactly what you need. No fluff. No upsell. Just the right package for your show.

What type of production do you need?
This determines which service applies to you.
How many people are speaking?
Microphones and cameras scale with your guest count.
Do you need multi-platform streaming?
Simultaneously broadcast to LinkedIn, YouTube, Instagram & more.
The goblin recommends
Professional
Two cameras, two mics, full multi-cast streaming setup. The sweet spot for most shows.
Services & Pricing

The Packages

Hourly rates available on request. All packages include HD master file delivery.

Also Available

Need broadcast-quality live streaming?

Multi-cam live production with multi-casting to up to 4 platforms at once. That side of the studio runs under Flaskamp Creative.
